patches.value: 对照 /proc/mounts 与 mount 输出识别宿主目录、Docker Socket、设备和可写敏感挂载，并记录挂载选项。
Compare /proc/mounts and mount output for host directories, Docker sockets, devices, and writable sensitive mounts while recording mount options.

CAP_EFF=$(awk '/^CapEff:/ {print $2}' /proc/self/status)
printf 'CapEff=%s\n' "$CAP_EFF"
capsh --decode="$CAP_EFF"
读取并解码当前进程的有效 Capability 位图；是否属于特权容器应结合设备、挂载、Seccomp、AppArmor 与运行时配置判断。
Read and decode the current process capability bitmap, combining it with devices, mounts, seccomp, AppArmor, and runtime configuration before classifying a privileged container.

trivy image myapp:lab
trivy image --severity HIGH,CRITICAL --ignore-unfixed myapp:lab
扫描本地实验镜像的软件包与已知漏洞，并分别保留全部结果和仅高危、已有修复项的报告。
Scan a local lab image for packages and known vulnerabilities, preserving both the complete report and a high-severity view limited to fixable findings.
Docker 与 Kubernetes 容器边界验证参考，覆盖 Capability、设备、宿主挂载、运行时 Socket、命名空间和内核接口等逃逸前提。
Docker and Kubernetes container-boundary validation reference covering capabilities, devices, host mounts, runtime sockets, namespaces, and kernel interfaces that form escape prerequisites.
Docker 运维与安全检查命令参考，覆盖容器状态、受控 Shell、镜像漏洞、历史层和资源使用，默认不修改运行配置。

Docker operations and security inspection reference covering container state, controlled shells, image vulnerabilities, layer history, and resource use without changing runtime configuration by default.
列出全部容器并查看指定容器配置、最近日志与瞬时资源统计，先建立运行状态基线。
List all containers and inspect one container's configuration, recent logs, and point-in-time resource usage to establish a runtime baseline.
在已授权容器中选择可用 Shell 执行交互检查，或启动会自动删除的一次性 Alpine 实验容器。
Select an available shell inside an authorized running container or launch a disposable Alpine lab container that is removed on exit.
用 Docker Scout、Trivy 与 Grype 对同一镜像交叉扫描，并结合完整层历史定位引入漏洞的软件包与构建步骤。
Cross-scan the same image with Docker Scout, Trivy, and Grype and use complete layer history to locate the package and build step introducing a finding.
kubectl 权限边界审计
kubectl Authorization-Boundary Audit

kubectl auth can-i --list --namespace default
kubectl auth can-i get secrets --all-namespaces
kubectl auth can-i create pods --namespace default
kubectl auth can-i create clusterrolebindings.rbac.authorization.k8s.io
只查询当前身份在命名空间与集群范围内的授权决策，识别 Secret、Pod 与 ClusterRoleBinding 能力而不创建任何资源。
Query namespace and cluster authorization decisions for secrets, pods, and cluster-role bindings without creating or modifying any resource.
Docker Swarm 只读清单
Docker Swarm Read-Only Inventory

docker node ls
docker service ls
docker service inspect service_name --pretty
docker service ps service_name --no-trunc
从 Swarm Manager 只读列出节点、服务、任务和服务配置，用于核对管理权限与宿主挂载，不创建特权服务。
Read nodes, services, tasks, and service configuration from a Swarm manager to review management access and host mounts without creating a privileged service.
